Get a Demo
Start Free Trial
Frequently Asked Questions
What does BambooHR do?
BambooHR is the complete HR platform that brings all your employee, payroll, time, and benefit information together in one place, giving you the data accuracy, security, and coordination you need to sleep soundly.
Does BambooHR do payroll?
Yes. BambooHR has its own add-on payroll solution that allows data to flow automatically, reducing the risk of double entry and making payroll runs quick and easy. In addition to seamless data flow, payroll customers also enjoy comprehensive payroll reporting, superior customer support, and full-service tax filing. Learn more by visiting the
product page
on the BambooHR website.
How much does BambooHR cost?
BambooHR pricing varies depending on the number of employees at your organization and the features you select. To get a free price quote, call 1-866-387-9595 or visit our
pricing page.
How many countries is BambooHR in?
BambooHR serves customers in over 150+ countries.
Is your support team outsourced?
No, our support team is entirely in-house to ensure you receive the best service possible.
Is BambooHR a PEO?
BambooHR is an HR software solution, not an outsourcing provider. While we don't provide HR staff for you, we do offer top-notch tools that help time-strapped HR professionals perform the work of many. Even a one-person HR department can use BambooHR to analyze people data, hire talent, onboard new employees, manage compensation, and help strengthen their company culture. And that's just the beginning.
Where's my data housed? How secure is BambooHR?
BambooHR customer data is hosted in the United States, Canada, or Ireland, depending on the location and needs of individual customers and applicable laws. All information is encrypted in transit, and sensitive fields are encrypted at rest. In addition, the data center located in Ireland meets all of the data requirements of the European Union, European Economic Area, Switzerland, and the United Kingdom.
We use a Zero Trust model to keep your data locked down at every level, and we take multiple measures to ensure it stays that way. Here are just some of the measures we take to prevent data leaks and unauthorized data access:
Defense in Depth multi-level data security
Annual third-party SOC II security audit
Frequent vulnerability scans
SAML Support
Web application firewall
Annual penetration test
In a rush? Try BambooHR now!
Start Free Trial

Getting Started With The API
Our open API makes it easy to integrate other applications into BambooHR. Use this guide to get started sharing your data across systems.
Easy to access. Easy to modify.
The BambooHR API is a RESTful Internet protocol built around making semantically meaningful HTTPS requests to access or modify a resource (usually done by an employee). The API can be used to manipulate employee data and to generate reports in several formats.
What will you need to get started?
A software developer to write code
An HTTP client:
This library may help you get started:
https://documentation.bamboohr.com/docs/language-bindings
Postman
.
Authentication
Create a free account at BambooHR's
developer portal
. Use of the developer portal and BambooHR developer tools is subject to the
BambooHR Developer Terms of Service
.
Create an application in the developer portal to get a client ID and secret
Create a test BambooHR account to develop against
Implement an OAuth flow in your application, following the instruction below
Note:
In all examples, replace
{companyDomain}
with the text that appears before
.bamboohr.com
in your company’s BambooHR URL. For example, if you log in at
https://mycompany.bamboohr.com
, your
companyDomain
is
mycompany
.
OAuth flow
Note:
The
Redirect URI
is the URL you registered when creating your app in the BambooHR Developer Portal. During the OAuth flow, BambooHR redirects users to this address along with a temporary authorization code. Make sure the Redirect URI you use in your requests exactly matches the one you registered — even small differences (such as an extra slash or capitalization change) can cause authentication errors.
Use this information to generate a token via a browser or curl:
https://{companyDomain}.bamboohr.com/authorize.php?request=authorize&state=new&response_type=code&scope=[multiple scopes separated by plus +]&client_id=<your App's client ID>&redirect_uri=<your App's Redirect URI as registered in the Developer Portal>
Your browser will redirect to the URI specified in
redirect_uri
, with additional information
&code=
followed by a temporary code.
Use this information to generate a token using the following call:
https://{companyDomain}.bamboohr.com/token.php?request=token
Body
{
   "client_secret": "<your App's client secret>",
   "client_id": "<your App's client ID>",
   "code": "<temporary code>",
   "grant_type": "authorization_code",
   "redirect_uri": "<your App's Redirect URI as registered in the Developer Portal>"
}
The API will return following response:
{
    "access_token": "<temporary access token>",
    "expires_in": 3600,
    "token_type": "Bearer",
    "scope": "<scopes separated by space>",
    "refresh_token": "<temporary refresh token>",
    "id_token": "<unique ID>",
    "companyDomain": "<your company domain>"
}
You can now use the
<Temporary access token>
in subsequent calls. In Postman, select 'Bearer Token' and enter the
<Temporary access token>
in the Token field.
NOTE: the refresh_token field will only be returned if you provided the
offline_access
scope in your original request to authorize.php. If you want to refresh your access token then you can use the refresh token in a call that looks like this:
https://{companyDomain}.bamboohr.com/token.php?request=token
Body
{
   "client_secret": "<your App's client secret>",
   "client_id": "<your App's client ID>",
   "refresh_token": "<your temporary refresh token>",
   "grant_type": "refresh_token",
   "redirect_uri": "<your App's Redirect URI as registered in the Developer Portal>"
}
OAuth is available in many APIs and requires configuring an application through the Developer Portal. Companies and developers can work with the BambooHR Marketplace team for support setting this up. You will need a BambooHR Application that includes Client ID and Client secret.
If you are a customer or are building an integration for a single BambooHR customer:
An account with BambooHR
The company domain used to access your account (If you access BambooHR at
https://mycompany.bamboohr.com
, then the company domain is
mycompany
)
An API key
Each API request sent from a third-party application to the BambooHR website will be authenticated and permissioned as if a real user were using the software. The permissions of the user associated with the API request will determine which fields and employees each API request is allowed to view and/or edit.
To generate an API key, users should log in and click their name in the lower left-hand corner of any page to get to the user context menu. If they have sufficient permissions, there will be an "API Keys" option in that menu to go to the page.
Each user may have one or more secret API keys that identify that user to the API. The API secret key is a 160-bit number expressed in hexadecimal form. This is an astronomically large number of unique keys, which means that guessing an API key is nearly impossible.
At the HTTP level, the API key is sent over HTTP Basic Authentication. Use the secret key as the username and any random string for the password.
To use curl to make an API request try:
cURL
curl
-i
-u
"{API Key}:x"
"https://{companyDomain}.bamboohr.com/api/v1/employees/directory"
To use Postman to make an API request using basic authentication, look at
this documentation
.
For more information about HTTP Basic Authentication, see
this helpful wikipedia article
.
If an unknown API key is used repeatedly, the API will disable access for a period of time. Users will still be able to log in to the BambooHR website during this time. When the API is disabled, it will send back an HTTP 403 Forbidden response to any requests it receives.
For more information about HTTP Basic Authentication, see
Basic Authentication
and for OAuth see
OAuth
.
Updated
2 months ago
What’s Next
See more detailed information about making requests to the API standard response codes.
Technical Overview
Copy Page

analysis.name: BambooHR
analysis.value_proposition: All-in-one HR platform unifying employee records, payroll, benefits, time tracking, and talent management to eliminate data silos and reduce HR administrative burden.
analysis.ideal_customer: Small to mid-sized companies (25–500 employees) needing a unified HRIS with built-in payroll, benefits, and talent management without stitching together multiple systems

features.name: employee records
features.description: Centralized, secure HR database for all sensitive employee data
features.evidence_quote: Manage all of your sensitive people data in one organized and secure HR database.

features.name: custom report builder
features.description: Build custom reports from BambooHR data with real-time previews
features.evidence_quote: Build custom reports in seconds using data from across BambooHR, with real-time previews

features.name: workflows and approvals
features.description: Built-in workflows to automate employee data updates and time-off requests
features.evidence_quote: Use built-in workflows to streamline employee information updates and time-off requests.

features.name: hr dashboards
features.description: Visualize key HR metrics for efficient analysis and data-driven decisions
features.evidence_quote: Visualize key HR metrics, enabling efficient analysis and data-driven decisions.

features.name: pre-built reports
features.description: Library of instant pre-built HR reports requiring no configuration
features.evidence_quote: instant, pre-built reports, automated workflows, an AI-powered HR assistant, and in-depth analytics

features.name: applicant tracking system
features.description: End-to-end ATS for sourcing, tracking, and hiring candidates
features.evidence_quote: Find, hire, and onboard the best talent quickly. With the powerful BambooHR applicant tracking system

features.name: candidate record
features.description: View contact info, resumes, cover letters, custom application answers, status, and rating per candidate
features.evidence_quote: View contact information, resumes, cover letters, answers to custom application questions, and the candidate's status

features.name: job posting
features.description: Post jobs to leading job boards and social networks from a single interface
features.evidence_quote: Easily reach more qualified candidates. Post jobs to leading boards and your social networks.

features.name: email and offer letter templates
features.description: Customizable email templates auto-populated with candidate data for outreach, offers, and rejections
features.evidence_quote: Create customizable email templates that auto-populate with candidate info for candidate communication, offer letters

features.name: onboarding
features.description: Proactive onboarding task management to create better first-day experiences for new hires
features.evidence_quote: proactive onboarding tasks, you can create a compelling candidate experience and better first days

features.name: time-off management
features.description: Streamline time-off requests, accruals, and approval flows
features.evidence_quote: Simplify time-off requests, accruals, approvals, and overall management.

features.name: time-off calendar
features.description: Visual calendar showing team time-off for scheduling and coverage visibility
features.evidence_quote: Time-Off Calenda[r]

features.name: payroll
features.description: Native payroll with automatic data flow from HR, multi-rate pay, and full-service tax filing
features.evidence_quote: run payroll all from a single platform. No more data double entry or manual approval processes

features.name: full-service tax filing
features.description: BambooHR handles payroll tax filing on behalf of the employer
features.evidence_quote: payroll customers also enjoy comprehensive payroll reporting, superior customer support, and full-service tax filing

features.name: payroll reporting
features.description: Comprehensive payroll reports included with the payroll add-on
features.evidence_quote: payroll customers also enjoy comprehensive payroll reporting, superior customer support

features.name: multi-rate pay
features.description: Track hours and manage employees with multiple pay rates within a single payroll run
features.evidence_quote: Track hours and manage multi-rate pay, simplify time off requests

features.name: benefits administration
features.description: Streamlined employee benefits enrollment and tracking integrated with HR data
features.evidence_quote: streamline benefits enrollment, and run payroll all from a single platform

features.name: time and attendance tracking
features.description: Employee hour tracking integrated with payroll and benefits
features.evidence_quote: Track hours and manage multi-rate pay, simplify time off requests, streamline benefits enrollment

features.name: performance management
features.description: Tools for performance reviews, goal-setting, and employee development tracking
features.evidence_quote: Build the kind of workplace where your people know you're invested in their happiness and development

features.name: employee experience
features.description: Feedback gathering and employee satisfaction measurement tools
features.evidence_quote: Get the tools you need to gather feedback, strengthen employee satisfaction, and grow your people.

features.name: compensation management
features.description: End-to-end compensation workflow: benchmarking, salary bands, planning, approvals, and total rewards comms
features.evidence_quote: Simplify your entire pay process—from benchmarking to planning and approvals—with BambooHR® Compensation

features.name: compensation benchmarking
features.description: Access to trusted market pay data to inform salary band creation and ensure fair pay
features.evidence_quote: Take the lead on compensation strategy with access to trusted benchmarking data and advanced planning tools

features.name: salary bands
features.description: Create and manage structured salary bands within the compensation planning module
features.evidence_quote: Create salary bands, streamline approvals, communicate total rewards, and ensure fair pay

features.name: total rewards communication
features.description: Communicate full compensation and benefits package to employees within the platform
features.evidence_quote: Create salary bands, streamline approvals, communicate total rewards, and ensure fair pay

features.name: global employment / employer of record
features.description: Hire and pay a global workforce with built-in compliance across international jurisdictions
features.evidence_quote: Expand your talent pool and pay a diverse, global workforce with accuracy, compliance, and peace-of-mind.

features.name: compliance training
features.description: Assign and track compliance training courses for employees, powered by EasyLlama
features.evidence_quote: Easily assign and track compliance courses with built-in Compliance Training powered by EasyLlama.

features.name: bamboo ai
features.description: Proprietary AI assistant layer embedded across HR workflows for faster data insights and answers
features.evidence_quote: instant, pre-built reports, automated workflows, an AI-powered HR assistant, and in-depth analytics

features.name: custom dashboards
features.description: User-configurable HR metric dashboards with trend visualization for strategic decisions
features.evidence_quote: Our new Custom Dashboards and HR Benchmarks give you the trends and context to drive more strategic

features.name: hr benchmarks
features.description: Compare company HR metrics against industry benchmarks for competitive context
features.evidence_quote: Our new Custom Dashboards and HR Benchmarks give you the trends and context to drive more strategic

features.name: restful api
features.description: RESTful API for reading and writing employee data and generating reports programmatically
features.evidence_quote: The BambooHR API is a RESTful Internet protocol built around making semantically meaningful HTTPS requests

features.name: oauth authentication
features.description: OAuth 2.0 authorization flow for third-party app integration via the developer portal
features.evidence_quote: Implement an OAuth flow in your application, following the instruction below

features.name: api key authentication
features.description: Per-user API key authentication for single-tenant integrations
features.evidence_quote: Each user may have one or more secret API keys that identify that user to the API.

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Global and permissioned webhooks supporting event-based and field-based real-time data push
features.evidence_quote: Global Webhooks / Permissioned Webhooks / Event-Based Webhooks / Field-Based Webhooks

features.name: developer portal
features.description: Self-service portal for registering API applications and managing client credentials
features.evidence_quote: Create a free account at BambooHR's developer portal.

features.name: official sdks
features.description: Official language-specific SDK bindings for the BambooHR REST API
features.evidence_quote: Official SDKs

features.name: integrations marketplace
features.description: Curated marketplace of 150+ pre-built third-party integrations
features.evidence_quote: 150+ pre-built integrations

integrations: 150+ named integrations via marketplace (specific names unavailable — marketplace page returned 404)
differentiators: All-in-one platform: HR, payroll, benefits, time, and talent in a single system with no double data entry
Serves 150+ countries with built-in global employment and employer-of-record capabilities
Bamboo AI™ — proprietary AI layer embedded across HR workflows
'Powerfully Easy' positioning — explicit simplicity and usability focus vs. enterprise-heavy competitors
Award-winning service & support as a named differentiator
Claims 40% HR cost reduction and hundreds of hours saved for customers

recent_ships.what: Compensation Management — salary bands, benchmarking data, planning, approvals, and total rewards communication
recent_ships.source: Build a Smarter Compensation Strategy — Simplify your entire pay process—from benchmarking to planning and approvals

recent_ships.what: Employer of Record for global hiring and payroll compliance

recent_ships.what: Custom Dashboards and HR Benchmarks for workforce analytics
recent_ships.source: Our new Custom Dashboards and HR Benchmarks give you the trends and context to drive more strategic people decisions.

recent_ships.what: Compliance Training powered by EasyLlama with built-in course assignment and tracking
recent_ships.source: Easily assign and track compliance courses with built-in Compliance Training powered by EasyLlama.

praised: Core HR functions are now centralized and accessible reducing the administrative burden. — Melissa E., Director of Safety and Risk Management
Streamlines our processes and makes our HR operations more efficient and cohesive. — Skye M., HR Generalist
BambooHR has given me more time to do the more important things! — Jocelyn E., HR Director
Out of all the HRIS systems, BambooHR is the easiest to connect with—it's simple, user-friendly, and a breeze to troubleshoot. — Christina F., Culture Amp

tiers.name: Core
tiers.headline_inclusions: Employee records, custom reports, workflows, ATS, job posting, offer letters, time-off management

pricing.notes: Per employee per month pricing with automatic volume discounts. Payroll, time & attendance, benefits, and compensation are sold as add-ons. Pricing page lists Core at $10/employee/month as a starting point but routes all quotes through a sales form. Multiple plan tiers mentioned ('multiple plan options') but only Core pricing was visible in source. Free trial available; no permanent free tier. Serves 150+ countries.
